title: BUG #18092: Unexpected Result by enable_seqscan
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES(1, NULL);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT c2 FROM v1 WHERE c1 = 1;
key_bug_features: Different results based on enable_seqscan setting
